name: touchstone
description: A falsification harness for trading signals. Strategy evaluation & benchmarking: forward-return -> beta-adjust -> episode-collapse -> multiple-comparison -> power on any scalar signal, plus a bootstrap Gate Selectivity Test on any block/skip decision log.

scripts.example: node src/index.mjs examples/perceptrade-frz/input.json --map price=btcPrice signal=frZ --gate examples/perceptrade-frz/decisions.json --json examples/perceptrade-frz/output.json
